About Programmes Research Publications Get Involved Donate
triAI

Advancing AI
for Africa.

TRI AI is a non-governmental institution democratising artificial intelligence by building African communities that enable learning, research, and the development of AI solutions for local and global impact.

Explore programmes Our research

Teaching Research Innovation

01 — What we do

Three divisions, one mission.

TRI AI is a branded house. Every initiative we run lives under one of three divisions that map directly to the name.

01 — Teaching

Equipping a generation

We equip African learners with practical AI skills through structured programmes, mentorship, and community-led learning experiences.

Learn more →

02 — Research

African questions, global answers

Driving research initiatives that address African challenges while contributing to the global AI ecosystem.

Learn more →

03 — Innovation

From research to real-world

Supporting the development of tools, datasets, and systems that translate research into deployable AI applications.

Learn more →

02 — Programmes

Where the work happens.

Active initiatives shaping AI knowledge across the continent.

triAI Teaching programme

TRI AI Saturdays Lagos

A community-led AI study group running cohorts of learners through structured curricula, peer learning, and mentorship.

Explore →
triAI Research programme

Sauti Project

Building speech and language resources for under-resourced African languages.

Explore →
